title: Spaghetti Alla Puttanesca
ingredients: ¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
½ cup Kalamata olives, roughly chopped
½ teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes
instructions: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes, chopped tomatoes, Kalamata olives, anchovies, capers, oregano, basil and red pepper flakes.
Simmer over medium low heat until thickened, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
While sauce is cooking, heat water and cook spaghetti al dente.
Drain pasta and serve sauce over top.
